paragraph: John Smith of the University of Testing falsified data in grant R01-ABC123 leading to sanctions.
text: John Smith of the University of Testing falsified data in grant R01-ABC123 leading to sanctions.

paragraph: The investigation by the National Science Foundation concluded that Dr. Smith intentionally manipulated results during the study period.
